target_goal.label: OPL-callable RedCube visual-domain node on upstream Hermes-Agent runtime substrate
target_goal.summary: Freeze the final target shape in which either a direct RedCube product entry or an OPL Gateway handoff converges onto the same service-safe RedCube domain entry, while upstream Hermes-Agent owns runtime substrate and RedCube owns visual-domain truth.

final_target_route.redcube_direct_entry: User -> RedCube Product Entry -> RedCube Gateway -> Hermes runtime substrate -> RedCube service-safe domain entry -> RedCube visual-domain truth surfaces
final_target_route.opl_federated_entry: User -> OPL Product Entry -> OPL Gateway -> Hermes runtime substrate -> RedCube service-safe domain entry -> RedCube visual-domain truth surfaces

must_not_claim: repo-local managed runtime pilot is the long-term runtime owner
service-safe domain entry already equals a landed end-user product entry
RedCube AI became the whole OPL

repo_verified_today: upstream Hermes-Agent owns route / managed run execution
RedCube service-safe domain entry is callable
RedCube product-entry service surface is callable
OPL handoff can federate into the same downstream product entry
not_landed_yet: managed web product shell on top of the landed service surface

excluded_scope: repackaging repo-local Hermes naming as upstream proof
